description.ko: 흑요석 기하학적 파편과 디지털 손상 아티팩트가 어우러져 질서가 혼돈으로 무너지는 과정을 고대비로 탐구한 작품입니다.
description.en: A high-contrast study of order collapsing into chaos, featuring obsidian geometric shards and digital corruption artifacts.

prompt: A digital sculpture by KURO-X, titled 'The Algorithmic Rupture.' A monolithic #1A1A1A obsidian sphere suspended in a #FFFFFF clinical void, captured at the exact moment of a geometric explosion. The core shatters into thousands of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards. Heavy digital glitch artifacts, pixel sorting layers, and sharp RGB chromatic aberration slicing through the composition. High-contrast ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian planes. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, mathematical chaos.
